---
title: "Dewey Data"
page-layout: article
---

# Dewey Data

## Description

Platform providing access to licensed third-party research datasets across healthcare, workforce, consumer behavior, transportation, and other domains. Useful for discovering specialized datasets.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Health & Medicine, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Workforce & Career Data
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Market Research, Health & Biomedical Data, Workforce & Career Data

## Access notes

Click "Sign in" and enter your yale.edu email address.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://www.deweydata.io/)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
